skills.name: movk-nuxt
skills.description: Build with the Movk Nuxt (@movk/nuxt) module — Schema-driven AutoForm (Zod v4), an API integration system (useApiFetch + upload/download progress), standalone M-prefixed UI components, the MDataTable grid, and utility composables (date formatting, theming, message boxes). Use when generating forms, fetching data, rendering tables, adding UI controls, or calling Movk Nuxt composables.
